<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Portail Formation</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap');
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; background: #f0f4f8; color: #1e293b; min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
  .container { width: 100%; max-width: 480px; padding: 2rem 1.5rem; }
  .logo { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; }
  .logo-icon { width: 56px; height: 56px; background: #1e40af; border-radius: 16px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .logo-icon svg { width: 28px; height: 28px; }
  .logo h1 { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; color: #1e293b; letter-spacing: -0.3px; }
  .logo p { font-size: 14px; color: #94a3b8; margin-top: 4px; }
  .card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 2rem; }
  .card label { display: block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 8px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .input-wrap { margin-bottom: 1.1rem; }
  .input-wrap input, .input-wrap textarea { width: 100%; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 15px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; color: #1e293b; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; }
  .input-wrap textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 120px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; line-height: 1.8; }
  .input-wrap input.code-style { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 18px; text-align: center; letter-spacing: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .input-wrap input:focus, .input-wrap textarea:focus { border-color: #3b82f6; }
  .input-wrap input.error { border-color: #ef4444; }
  .divider { height: 1px; background: #e2e8f0; margin: 1.25rem 0; }
  .btn { width: 100%; padding: 13px; background: #1e40af; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; }
  .btn:hover { background: #1d4ed8; }
  .btn.green { background: #16a34a; }
  .btn.green:hover { background: #15803d; }
  .btn:disabled { background: #374151; cursor: not-allowed; }
  .error-msg { display: none; background: rgba(239,68,68,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3); color: #f87171; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 13px; margin-top: 12px; text-align: center; }
  .success-msg { display: none; background: rgba(34,197,94,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3); color: #4ade80; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 13px; margin-top: 12px; text-align: center; }
  .info-msg { background: rgba(59,130,246,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.3); color: #93c5fd; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; line-height: 1.6; }
  .loading-screen { text-align: center; padding: 3rem 1rem; color: #64748b; }
  .loading-screen p { font-size: 14px; margin-top: 1rem; }
  .spinner { width: 32px; height: 32px; border: 3px solid #e2e8f0; border-top-color: #3b82f6; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite; margin: 0 auto; }
  @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
  #access-page, #admin-page, #login-page, #setup-page { display: none; }
  .timer-bar { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
  .timer-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; background: #22c55e; border-radius: 50%; animation: pulse 2s infinite; }
  @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0.3} }
  .timer-label { font-size: 13px; color: #64748b; }
  .timer-value { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 14px; color: #22c55e; font-weight: 500; margin-left: auto; }
  .timer-dot.expired { background: #ef4444; animation: none; }
  .timer-value.expired { color: #ef4444; }
  .files-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  /* FIX 3 — file card states */
  .file-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 10px; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; }
  .file-card:hover { border-color: #3b82f6; background: #eff6ff; }
  .file-card.checking { opacity: 0.6; pointer-events: none; }
  .file-card.ok { border-color: rgba(34,197,94,0.4); }
  .file-card.broken { border-color: rgba(239,68,68,0.4); opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }
  .file-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; background: rgba(59,130,246,0.15); border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .file-icon svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; color: #60a5fa; }
  .file-icon.ok-icon { background: rgba(34,197,94,0.15); }
  .file-icon.ok-icon svg { color: #4ade80; }
  .file-icon.broken-icon { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.15); }
  .file-icon.broken-icon svg { color: #f87171; }
  .file-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
  .file-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #1e293b; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
  .file-sub { font-size: 12px; color: #94a3b8; margin-top: 2px; }
  .file-arrow { color: #cbd5e1; font-size: 18px; }
  .expired-banner { display: none; background: rgba(239,68,68,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3); border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.25rem; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .expired-banner p { color: #f87171; font-size: 14px; }
  .expired-banner strong { display: block; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .welcome-badge { background: rgba(34,197,94,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.2); border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 14px; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; font-size: 13px; color: #16a34a; text-align: center; }
  .admin-field { margin-bottom: 1.1rem; }
  .admin-field label { display: block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 8px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .admin-field input { width: 100%; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 10px; padding: 11px 14px; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; color: #1e293b; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; }
  .admin-field input:focus { border-color: #3b82f6; }
  .admin-section-title { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin: 1.5rem 0 1rem; padding-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #2a2d3a; }
  .admin-badge { display: inline-block; background: rgba(239,68,68,0.15); color: #f87171; font-size: 11px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px; margin-left: 8px; }
  .fichier-block { background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 10px; padding: 1rem; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .fichier-block .admin-field { margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .fichier-block .admin-field:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
  .code-display { background: rgba(59,130,246,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.3); border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px; text-align: center; margin-top: 1rem; }
  .code-display span { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 24px; color: #60a5fa; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 4px; }
  .code-display p { font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; margin-top: 4px; }
  .hint { font-size: 12px; color: #94a3b8; margin-top: 6px; line-height: 1.6; }
  .count-badge { display: inline-block; background: rgba(34,197,94,0.15); color: #4ade80; font-size: 12px; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 6px; margin-left: 8px; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; }

  .modal-overlay { display:none; position:fixed; top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.55); z-index:1000; align-items:center; justify-content:center; }
  .modal-overlay.active { display:flex; }
  .modal-box { background:#fff; border-radius:16px; padding:2rem; max-width:380px; width:90%; box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); }
  .modal-box h3 { font-size:16px; font-weight:600; color:#1e293b; margin-bottom:0.75rem; }
  .modal-box p { font-size:14px; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:1.5rem; line-height:1.6; }
  .modal-code { font-family:'DM Mono',monospace; font-size:17px; font-weight:600; color:#1e40af; }
  .modal-buttons { display:flex; gap:10px; }
  .modal-buttons button { flex:1; padding:11px; border:none; border-radius:10px; font-size:14px; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; }
  .btn-cancel  { background:#f1f5f9; color:#64748b; }
  .btn-confirm { background:#1e40af; color:#fff; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="container">

  <!-- LOADING -->
  <div id="loading-page">
    <div class="loading-screen"><div class="spinner"></div><p>Chargement...</p></div>
  </div>

  <!-- SETUP -->
  <div id="setup-page">
    <div class="logo">
      <div class="logo-icon" style="background:#7c3aed;">
        <svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="white" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M13.828 10.172a4 4 0 00-5.656 0l-4 4a4 4 0 105.656 5.656l1.102-1.101m-.758-4.899a4 4 0 005.656 0l4-4a4 4 0 00-5.656-5.656l-1.1 1.1"/></svg>
      </div>
      <h1>Configuration</h1>
      <p>Première configuration du portail</p>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="info-msg">ℹ️ Apps Script → Déployer → Copie l'URL et colle-la ici. Une seule fois par appareil.</div>
      <label>URL Apps Script</label>
      <div class="input-wrap"><input type="text" id="setup-url" placeholder="https://script.google.com/macros/s/.../exec"/></div>
      <button class="btn" onclick="saveSetupUrl()">Enregistrer et continuer</button>
      <div class="error-msg" id="setup-error">URL invalide</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- LOGIN -->
  <div id="login-page">
    <div class="logo">
      <div class="logo-icon" style="background:transparent;padding:4px;">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:48px;height:auto;object-fit:contain;"/>
      </div>
      <h1>Portail Formation</h1>
      <p>Entrez vos informations pour accéder</p>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <label>Code de session</label>
      <div class="input-wrap"><input type="text" id="code-input" class="code-style" placeholder="XXXX" maxlength="10" autocomplete="off" spellcheck="false"/></div>
      <div class="divider"></div>
      <label>Matricule</label>
      <div class="input-wrap"><input type="text" id="matricule-input" placeholder="Ex: 500701"/></div>
      <label>Numéro de téléphone</label>
      <div class="input-wrap"><input type="tel" id="tel-input" placeholder="Ex: 0612345678"/></div>
      <button class="btn" id="login-btn" onclick="checkCode()">Accéder aux supports</button>
      <div class="error-msg" id="error-msg"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ACCESS -->
  <div id="access-page">
    <div class="logo">
      <div class="logo-icon" style="background:transparent;padding:4px;">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:48px;height:auto;object-fit:contain;"/>
      </div>
      <h1>Supports de Formation</h1>
      <p>Accès accordé — bonne formation !</p>
    </div>
    <div class="welcome-badge" id="welcome-badge">👋 Bienvenue !</div>
    <div class="timer-bar">
      <div class="timer-dot" id="timer-dot"></div>
      <span class="timer-label">Accès valide encore</span>
      <span class="timer-value" id="timer-display">--:--:--</span>
    </div>
    <div class="expired-banner" id="expired-banner">
      <strong>Accès expiré</strong><p>La session est terminée.</p>
    </div>
    <p class="files-title">Fichiers disponibles</p>
    <div id="files-list"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- ADMIN -->
  <div id="admin-page">
    <div class="logo">
      <div class="logo-icon" style="background:#7c3aed;">
        <svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="white" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10.325 4.317c.426-1.756 2.924-1.756 3.35 0a1.724 1.724 0 002.573 1.066c1.543-.94 3.31.826 2.37 2.37a1.724 1.724 0 001.065 2.572c1.756.426 1.756 2.924 0 3.35a1.724 1.724 0 00-1.066 2.573c.94 1.543-.826 3.31-2.37 2.37a1.724 1.724 0 00-2.572 1.065c-.426 1.756-2.924 1.756-3.35 0a1.724 1.724 0 00-2.573-1.066c-1.543.94-3.31-.826-2.37-2.37a1.724 1.724 0 00-1.065-2.572c-1.756-.426-1.756-2.924 0-3.35a1.724 1.724 0 001.066-2.573c-.94-1.543.826-3.31 2.37-2.37.996.608 2.296.07 2.572-1.065z"/><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 12a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <h1>Admin <span class="admin-badge">Privé</span></h1>
      <p>Configuration de la session</p>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <p class="admin-section-title">🔗 URL Apps Script</p>
      <div class="admin-field">
        <label>URL de déploiement</label>
        <input type="text" id="admin-url" placeholder="https://script.google.com/macros/s/.../exec"/>
        <p class="hint">Change si tu as fait un nouveau déploiement.</p>
      </div>
      <button class="btn" onclick="saveUrl()" id="save-url-btn" style="margin-bottom:0.5rem;">🔗 Mettre à jour l'URL</button>
      <div class="success-msg" id="url-success">✅ URL mise à jour !</div>
      <div class="error-msg" id="url-error">URL invalide.</div>

      <p class="admin-section-title">🔑 Code stagiaires</p>
      <div class="admin-field">
        <label>Code</label>
        <input type="text" id="admin-code"/>
      </div>

      <p class="admin-section-title">⏰ Session</p>
      <div class="admin-field">
        <label>Date et heure de début</label>
        <input type="datetime-local" id="admin-session"/>
      </div>
      <div class="admin-field">
        <label>Durée (heures)</label>
        <input type="number" id="admin-duree" min="1" max="24" value="8"/>
      </div>

      <p class="admin-section-title">👥 Matricules autorisés <span id="liste-count" class="count-badge" style="display:none;"></span></p>
      <div class="input-wrap">
        <textarea id="admin-liste" placeholder="500701&#10;500702&#10;500703&#10;...&#10;(un matricule par ligne)"></textarea>
      </div>
      <p class="hint">⚠️ Khlitiha khawya → koul wahd idkhol. Zid matricules → ghir had nass.</p>
      <button class="btn green" onclick="saveListe()" id="save-liste-btn" style="margin-bottom:0.75rem;">👥 Enregistrer la liste</button>
      <div class="success-msg" id="liste-success"></div>
      <div class="error-msg" id="liste-error">Erreur — réessaye.</div>

      <p class="admin-section-title">📎 Fichiers Drive</p>
      <div id="admin-fichiers"></div>

      <button class="btn green" onclick="saveAdmin()" id="save-btn">💾 Enregistrer config</button>
      <div class="success-msg" id="admin-success">✅ Config sauvegardée !</div>
      <div class="error-msg" id="admin-error">Erreur — réessaye.</div>

      <p class="admin-section-title">📋 Code actuel</p>
      <div class="code-display">
        <span id="code-show">—</span>
        <p>Ce code fonctionne sur tous les appareils</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>


  <!-- MODAL CONFIRMATION -->
  <div class="modal-overlay" id="confirm-modal">
    <div class="modal-box">
      <h3>⚠️ Confirmer le changement</h3>
      <p>Tu vas changer le code de <span class="modal-code" id="modal-old-code"></span> vers <span class="modal-code" id="modal-new-code"></span>.<br><br>Les stagiaires devront utiliser le nouveau code.</p>
      <div class="modal-buttons">
        <button class="btn-cancel"  onclick="closeModal()">Annuler</button>
        <button class="btn-confirm" onclick="confirmAndSave()">Confirmer ✅</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  let SCRIPT_URL = "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxii10w6zLICU2H2A879R8ktlEm8jJWXIYTjcs7xM2euO2MOD2F41NQU5KBhd3v6X_Klw/exec"; // ← Changer ici si nouveau déploiement
  let currentConfig = null;

  async function init() {
    const isAdmin = window.location.hash === "#admin";
    if (!SCRIPT_URL) { hide("loading-page"); show("setup-page"); return; }
    try {
      const res = await fetch(SCRIPT_URL + "?action=getConfig&t=" + Date.now());
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.success) currentConfig = data.config;
    } catch(e) {}
    hide("loading-page");
    if (isAdmin) { show("admin-page"); loadAdminForm(); }
    else { show("login-page"); clearFields(); }
  }

  function show(id) { document.getElementById(id).style.display = 'block'; }
  function hide(id) { document.getElementById(id).style.display = 'none'; }
  function clearFields() {
    ['code-input','matricule-input','tel-input'].forEach(id => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.value=''; });
    const err = document.getElementById('error-msg'); if(err) err.style.display='none';
    const btn = document.getElementById('login-btn'); if(btn) { btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent="Accéder aux supports"; }
  }

  function saveSetupUrl() {
    const url = document.getElementById('setup-url').value.trim();
    if (!url.includes('script.google.com')) { document.getElementById('setup-error').style.display='block'; return; }
    SCRIPT_URL = url; // Mis à jour en mémoire uniquement
    hide("setup-page"); show("loading-page"); init();
  }

  function saveUrl() {
    const url = document.getElementById('admin-url').value.trim();
    const ok = document.getElementById('url-success'), err = document.getElementById('url-error');
    if (!url.includes('script.google.com')) { err.style.display='block'; ok.style.display='none'; return; }
    SCRIPT_URL = url; // Mis à jour en mémoire uniquement
    err.style.display='none'; ok.style.display='block';
    setTimeout(()=>ok.style.display='none', 3000);
  }

  /* ===== LOGIN avec les 3 fixes ===== */
  async function checkCode() {
    const code      = document.getElementById('code-input').value.trim().toUpperCase();
    const matricule = document.getElementById('matricule-input').value.trim();
    const tel       = document.getElementById('tel-input').value.trim();
    const err       = document.getElementById('error-msg');
    const btn       = document.getElementById('login-btn');

    if (!code || !matricule || !tel) {
      err.textContent = "Remplis tous les champs."; err.style.display='block'; return;
    }

    // Validation téléphone 10 chiffres
    const telDigits = tel.replace(/\s/g, '');
    if (!/^\d{10}$/.test(telDigits)) {
      document.getElementById('tel-input').classList.add('error');
      err.textContent = "⚠️ Numéro invalide — exactement 10 chiffres requis."; err.style.display='block';
      setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('tel-input').classList.remove('error'), 2000); return;
    }

    err.style.display='none'; btn.disabled=true; btn.textContent="Vérification...";

    // Re-fetch config fraîche
    try {
      const res = await fetch(SCRIPT_URL + "?action=getConfig&t=" + Date.now());
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.success) currentConfig = data.config;
    } catch(e) {}

    const cfg = currentConfig;
    if (!cfg) {
      btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent="Accéder aux supports";
      err.textContent="Erreur connexion — actualise la page."; err.style.display='block'; return;
    }

    if (code !== String(cfg.code).toUpperCase()) {
      document.getElementById('code-input').classList.add('error');
      err.textContent="Code incorrect."; err.style.display='block';
      btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent="Accéder aux supports";
      setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('code-input').classList.remove('error'), 1500); return;
    }

    btn.textContent="Vérification matricule...";

    // checkMatricule via GET — fail-closed (si erreur → bloque)
    let matriculeAllowed = false;
    try {
      const res = await fetch(SCRIPT_URL + "?action=checkMatricule&matricule=" + encodeURIComponent(matricule) + "&t=" + Date.now());
      const data = await res.json();
      matriculeAllowed = (data.success && data.allowed === true);
    } catch(e) {
      btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent="Accéder aux supports";
      err.textContent="❌ Erreur connexion — réessaye."; err.style.display='block'; return;
    }
    if (!matriculeAllowed) {
      btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent="Accéder aux supports";
      err.textContent="❌ Matricule non autorisé. Contacte ton formateur."; err.style.display='block'; return;
    }

    btn.textContent="Chargement...";

    // FIX 2 — saveEntry avec anti double-entrée
    try {
      await fetch(SCRIPT_URL, { method:"POST", mode:"no-cors", headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},
        body: JSON.stringify({ action:"saveEntry", matricule, telephone:telDigits, code }) });
    } catch(e) {}

    hide("login-page"); show("access-page");
    document.getElementById('welcome-badge').textContent = `👋 Bienvenue — ${matricule}`;
    renderFiles(); startTimer();
  }

  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    const lp = document.getElementById('login-page');
    if (e.key==='Enter' && lp && lp.style.display!=='none') checkCode();
  });

  /* ===== FIX 3 — Files avec vérification lien ===== */
  function convertDriveUrl(url) {
    if (!url) return url;
    // Format: /file/d/FILE_ID/view → uc?export=download&id=FILE_ID
    let m = url.match(/\/file\/d\/([^\/]+)/);
    if (m) return 'https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=' + m[1];
    // Format: open?id=FILE_ID
    m = url.match(/[?&]id=([^&]+)/);
    if (m) return 'https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=' + m[1];
    return url;
  }

  function renderFiles() {
    const fichiers = currentConfig?.fichiers || [];
    const c = document.getElementById('files-list'); c.innerHTML = '';
    fichiers.forEach(f => {
      const a = document.createElement('a');
      const dlUrl = convertDriveUrl(f.url);
      a.href = dlUrl; a.target='_blank'; a.rel='noopener noreferrer'; a.className='file-card checking'; a.download='';
      a.innerHTML = `
        <div class="file-icon" id="icon-${encodeURIComponent(f.name)}">
          <svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 10v6m0 0l-3-3m3 3l3-3m2 8H7a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h5.586 a1 1 0 01.707.293l5.414 5.414a1 1 0 01.293.707V19a2 2 0 01-2 2z"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <div class="file-info">
          <div class="file-name">${f.name}</div>
          <div class="file-sub" id="sub-${encodeURIComponent(f.name)}">Vérification...</div>
        </div>
        <span class="file-arrow">›</span>`;
      c.appendChild(a);

      // FIX 3 — Vérification lien Drive
      checkDriveLink(dlUrl).then(ok => {
        a.classList.remove('checking');
        const icon = document.getElementById('icon-' + encodeURIComponent(f.name));
        const sub  = document.getElementById('sub-'  + encodeURIComponent(f.name));
        if (ok) {
          a.classList.add('ok');
          if (icon) icon.className = 'file-icon ok-icon';
          if (sub)  sub.textContent = '✅ Disponible — cliquez pour télécharger';
        } else {
          a.classList.add('broken');
          if (icon) icon.className = 'file-icon broken-icon';
          if (sub)  sub.textContent = '❌ Lien non disponible — contacte ton formateur';
        }
      });
    });
  }

  async function checkDriveLink(url) {
    if (!url || url.trim() === '') return false;
    try {
      const res = await fetch(url, { method:'HEAD', mode:'no-cors' });
      // no-cors = opaque response → si pas d'erreur = lien accessible
      return true;
    } catch(e) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  /* ===== TIMER ===== */
  function startTimer() {
    const cfg = currentConfig; if (!cfg) return;
    const END = new Date(cfg.sessionStart).getTime() + Number(cfg.dureeHeures) * 3600000;
    function upd() {
      const rem=END-Date.now(), dot=document.getElementById('timer-dot'), disp=document.getElementById('timer-display'), banner=document.getElementById('expired-banner');
      if (rem<=0) { dot.classList.add('expired'); disp.classList.add('expired'); disp.textContent='Expiré'; banner.style.display='block'; document.querySelectorAll('.file-card').forEach(c=>{c.style.pointerEvents='none';c.style.opacity='0.4';}); return; }
      const h=Math.floor(rem/3600000),m=Math.floor((rem%3600000)/60000),s=Math.floor((rem%60000)/1000);
      disp.textContent=`${String(h).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(m).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(s).padStart(2,'0')}`;
      setTimeout(upd,1000);
    }
    upd();
  }

  /* ===== ADMIN ===== */
  async function loadAdminForm() {
    document.getElementById('admin-url').value = SCRIPT_URL || '';
    const cfg = currentConfig || { code:'', sessionStart:'', dureeHeures:8, fichiers:[{name:'Support de formation',sous_titre:'Cliquez pour télécharger',url:''},{name:'Photo de groupe',sous_titre:'Cliquez pour télécharger',url:''}] };
    document.getElementById('admin-code').value    = cfg.code || '';
    document.getElementById('admin-duree').value   = cfg.dureeHeures || 8;
    document.getElementById('admin-session').value = (cfg.sessionStart||'').slice(0,16);
    document.getElementById('code-show').textContent = cfg.code || '—';
    const c = document.getElementById('admin-fichiers'); c.innerHTML='';
    (cfg.fichiers||[]).forEach((f,i) => {
      c.innerHTML += `<div class="fichier-block"><div class="admin-field"><label>Nom ${i+1}</label><input type="text" id="fname-${i}" value="${f.name||''}"/></div><div class="admin-field"><label>Lien Drive</label><input type="text" id="furl-${i}" value="${f.url||''}"/></div></div>`;
    });
    // Charger la liste des matricules depuis Apps Script
    try {
      const res  = await fetch(SCRIPT_URL + "?action=getListe&t=" + Date.now());
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.success && data.matricules && data.matricules.length > 0) {
        document.getElementById('admin-liste').value = data.matricules.join('\n');
        const badge = document.getElementById('liste-count');
        badge.textContent = data.matricules.length + ' nass';
        badge.style.display = 'inline-block';
      }
    } catch(e) {}
  }

  /* FIX — Confirmation avant changement de code */
  function confirmSaveAdmin() {
    const newCode     = document.getElementById('admin-code').value.trim().toUpperCase();
    const currentCode = (currentConfig?.code?.toString() || '').toUpperCase();
    if (newCode !== currentCode && currentCode !== '') {
      document.getElementById('modal-old-code').textContent = currentCode;
      document.getElementById('modal-new-code').textContent = newCode;
      document.getElementById('confirm-modal').classList.add('active');
    } else {
      saveAdmin();
    }
  }

  function closeModal() {
    document.getElementById('confirm-modal').classList.remove('active');
  }

  function confirmAndSave() {
    closeModal();
    saveAdmin();
  }

  async function saveListe() {
    const matricules = document.getElementById('admin-liste').value.split('\n').map(m=>m.trim()).filter(m=>m!=='');
    const btn=document.getElementById('save-liste-btn'), ok=document.getElementById('liste-success'), err=document.getElementById('liste-error');
    btn.disabled=true; btn.textContent="Enregistrement...";
    try {
      await fetch(SCRIPT_URL, { method:"POST", mode:"no-cors", headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},
        body: JSON.stringify({ action:"saveListe", matricules }) });
      ok.textContent=`✅ ${matricules.length} matricule(s) sauvegardé(s) !`; ok.style.display='block'; err.style.display='none';
      const badge=document.getElementById('liste-count'); badge.textContent=`${matricules.length} nass`; badge.style.display='inline-block';
      setTimeout(()=>ok.style.display='none', 3000);
    } catch(e) { err.style.display='block'; }
    btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent="👥 Enregistrer la liste";
  }

  async function saveAdmin() {
    const cfg=currentConfig||{fichiers:[{sous_titre:'Cliquez pour télécharger'},{sous_titre:'Cliquez pour télécharger'}]};
    const code=document.getElementById('admin-code').value.trim().toUpperCase();
    const session=document.getElementById('admin-session').value;
    const duree=parseInt(document.getElementById('admin-duree').value);
    const errEl=document.getElementById('admin-error'), okEl=document.getElementById('admin-success');
    const btn=document.getElementById('save-btn');
    if (!code||!session||!duree) { errEl.style.display='block'; okEl.style.display='none'; return; }
    const fichiers=(cfg.fichiers||[]).map((f,i)=>({ name:document.getElementById(`fname-${i}`)?.value.trim()||f.name, sous_titre:f.sous_titre||'Cliquez pour télécharger', url:document.getElementById(`furl-${i}`)?.value.trim()||f.url }));
    btn.disabled=true; btn.textContent="⏳ Envoi en cours...";
    errEl.style.display='none'; okEl.style.display='none';
    try {
      await fetch(SCRIPT_URL, {
        method: "POST",
        mode: "no-cors",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ action:"saveConfig", code, sessionStart:session+":00", dureeHeures:duree, fichiers })
      });
      currentConfig = { code, sessionStart:session+":00", dureeHeures:duree, fichiers };
      document.getElementById('code-show').textContent = code;
      okEl.textContent = "✅ Config sauvegardée ! Code actif : " + code;
      okEl.style.display = 'block';
      setTimeout(() => okEl.style.display='none', 5000);
    } catch(e) {
      errEl.textContent = "❌ Erreur : " + e.message;
      errEl.style.display = 'block';
    }
    btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent="💾 Enregistrer config";
  }

  init();
</script>
</body>
</html>
